steps.title: Identify the stated outcome
steps.content: The passage states that the musical “establishes him as a compelling and well-defined protagonist”—the effect of omitting his elitism and ideological complexity.

steps.title: Connect to the answer
steps.content: A well-defined protagonist free of internal contradiction is precisely an unambiguous thematic presentation. The other three choices describe effects the passage doesn't identify. That matches choice C — C is correct.
